# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the public documentation, demo, or architecture change.

## Public-Safety Checklist

- [ ] No proprietary application source code is included.
- [ ] No internal guardrail implementation logic is included.
- [ ] No credentials, tokens, customer data, private URLs, or live infrastructure values are included.
- [ ] Examples are synthetic.
- [ ] `./scripts/validate-public-repo.sh` passes.
